title: Custom Private Halal in Hamburg Tour
shortDescription: A tailored private walking experience shaped around your interests, schedule, and Muslim-friendly preferences.
fullDescription: This is the most flexible option in the collection. Guests can request a route that emphasizes old town heritage, waterfront views, family comfort, halal-conscious food planning, or a softer orientation around prayer and daily rhythm. It is ideal for travellers who want Hamburg explained in a way that feels personal and thoughtfully arranged.
heroImageAlt: Illustration for a custom private Halal in Hamburg walking tour
muslimFriendlyFeatures: Custom route planning around prayer timing and food needs
Suitable for private family, couple, or friend groups
included: Optional recommendations list after the tour
routeHighlights: Useful local recommendations for the rest of your stay
availabilityNote: Best for guests with specific route requests or private group needs.

faq.question: Can we request a women-only or private family format?
faq.answer: You can mention that preference in the booking notes and we can plan accordingly where possible.
